description_long: This is a sleek, modern airplane with a streamlined fuselage and sharply swept wings, designed for high-speed flight. The wings are mid-mounted and feature a slight anhedral angle, with no visible winglets. Two large turbofan engines are mounted at the rear of the fuselage, flanking a prominent tail section. The tail design is a conventional T-tail, with a single vertical stabilizer and a high-mounted horizontal stabilizer. The cockpit is located at the forward end of the fuselage, featuring a large, tinted canopy with multiple windows. The exterior is primarily white with dark accents, giving it a futuristic and high-performance appearance.
description: A modern, white airplane with swept mid-mounted wings, rear twin turbofan engines, and a T-tail. The forward cockpit features a large, tinted canopy and the overall design is sleek and aerodynamic.
description_view_0: Rear view showing the twin rear-mounted turbofan engines, T-tail, and the anhedral mid-mounted wings.
description_view_1: Left side profile highlighting the streamlined fuselage, swept wings, and the forward cockpit canopy.
description_view_2: Front view displaying the pointed nose, large cockpit windows, and the full wingspan with anhedral angle.
description_view_3: Right side profile similar to the left, showing the engine placement, tail structure, and wing configuration.
attribute_wingspan_configuration: Mid-wing configuration with sharply swept wings and a slight anhedral angle, no winglets or variable geometry.
attribute_tail_design: Conventional T-tail with a single vertical stabilizer and high-mounted horizontal stabilizer
attribute_landing_gear_type: Tricycle retractable landing gear with visible main and nose gear units
attribute_cockpit_placement: Forward-mounted, enclosed cockpit with a large, multi-window canopy
